initial_candidates.sql:
WITH team_max_goals AS (
  SELECT team_id, MAX(goals_for) AS max_goals
  FROM seasons
  GROUP BY team_id
),
ordered_goals AS (
  SELECT max_goals,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY max_goals) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM team_max_goals
)
SELECT AVG(max_goals) AS median
FROM ordered_goals
WHERE rn IN ((total_count + 1) / 2, (total_count + 2) / 2);

WITH max_goals_per_team AS (
  SELECT team_id, MAX(goals_for) AS max_goals
  FROM seasons
  GROUP BY team_id
),
ordered_max_goals AS (
  SELECT max_goals, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY max_goals) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM max_goals_per_team
)
SELECT AVG(max_goals) AS median
FROM ordered_max_goals
WHERE rn IN ((total_count + 1) / 2, (total_count + 2) / 2);

WITH highest_season_goals AS (
  SELECT team_id, MAX(goals_for) AS max_goals
  FROM seasons
  GROUP BY team_id
),
ordered_goals AS (
  SELECT max_goals,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY max_goals) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM highest_season_goals
)
SELECT AVG(max_goals) AS median
FROM ordered_goals
WHERE rn IN ((total_count + 1) / 2, (total_count + 2) / 2);

WITH team_max_goals AS (
  SELECT team_id, MAX(goals_for) AS max_goals
  FROM seasons
  GROUP BY team_id
),
ordered_goals AS (
  SELECT max_goals,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY max_goals) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM team_max_goals
)
SELECT AVG(max_goals) AS median
FROM ordered_goals
WHERE rn IN ((total_count + 1) / 2, (total_count + 2) / 2);

WITH team_max_goals AS (
  SELECT team_id, MAX(goals_for) AS max_goals
  FROM seasons
  GROUP BY team_id
),
ordered_max_goals AS (
  SELECT max_goals
  FROM team_max_goals
  ORDER BY max_goals
),
row_numbers AS (
  SELECT max_goals, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY max_goals) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_count
  FROM ordered_max_goals
)
SELECT AVG(max_goals) AS median
FROM row_numbers
WHERE rn IN ((total_count + 1) / 2, (total_count + 2) / 2);
